title: Navi's shuttle
content:

This '''[[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]''' was the elegant [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]]-designed personal transport of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Navi]].

*''[[Jedi: Yoda]]''
